Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.distinguishing_features: healed bullet wound on the side of his head (temple)
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: He felt the side of his head and confirmed the wound had already healed.

Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: black vest with a matching suit, trousers that clung tightly to his legs, a halved top hat; alternatively a brownish-yellow coat with a matching rounded felt hat
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: hideous healing wound on left temple, pale face
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text describes his decent set of clothing and his alternative coat and hat.

Benson Moretti.source_notes: Described as Klein's older brother who works at an import and export company. Visuals are guessed based on setting and relation to Klein.
